nasb.text: So Pilate asked Him, saying, “Are You the King of the Jews?” And He answered him and said, “It is as you say.”

esv.text: And Pilate asked him, “Are you the King of the Jews?” And he answered him, “You have said so.”

cnv.text: 彼拉多問他：“你是猶太人的王嗎？”耶穌回答：“你已經說了。”

ccb.text: 彼拉多问耶稣：“你是犹太人的王吗？” 耶稣回答说：“如你所言。”

csbs.text: 彼拉多问耶稣：“你是犹太人的王吗？” 耶稣回答说：“是你说的。”
